project.name: uni-types
project.description: Universal TypeScript Type Utilities - A comprehensive library of 2475+ type utilities for advanced TypeScript development

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Main barrel file re-exporting 2475 types from 30+ submodules covering AI/ML, algorithms, auth, caching, blockchain, and other domain-specific type utilities. Organized by feature version with clear section comments.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript barrel file using re-exports with version-organized sections. Pure type-only exports (no runtime code).

nodes.name: v1.1.0.test.ts
nodes.summary: Type tests for v1.1.0 features including brand types. Uses vitest's expectTypeOf for compile-time type assertions.

nodes.name: v1.2.0.test.ts
nodes.summary: Type tests for v1.2.0 features. Validates type-level utilities with vitest type assertions.

nodes.name: v1.3.0.test.ts
nodes.summary: Type tests for v1.3.0 assert and async utilities. Validates type guards and async type helpers.

nodes.name: v1.4.0.test.ts
nodes.summary: Type tests for v1.4.0 type-level algorithms (Find, Includes, Unique, etc.). Tests compile-time algorithm implementations.

nodes.name: v1.5.0.test.ts
nodes.summary: Type tests for v1.5.0 authorization (RBAC/ABAC) and caching strategy types.

nodes.name: v1.6.0.test.ts
nodes.summary: Type tests for v1.6.0 AI/ML type utilities including tensors, models, and training configs.

nodes.name: v1.7.0.test.ts
nodes.summary: Type tests for v1.7.0 features. Validates type definitions with vitest.

nodes.name: v1.8.0.test.ts
nodes.summary: Type tests for v1.8.0 features with extensive type assertion suites.

nodes.name: v1.9.0.test.ts
nodes.summary: Type tests for v1.9.0 animation, audio, and blockchain type utilities.

nodes.name: v1.11.0.test.ts
nodes.summary: Type tests for v1.11.0 breaking change detection, deprecation management, and migration types.

nodes.name: v1.12.0.test.ts
nodes.summary: Type tests for v1.12.0 features. Comprehensive type validation suite.

nodes.name: ClientOnly.vue
nodes.summary: Client-side rendering guard component that only renders its default slot after hydration is complete, with an optional fallback slot for server-side rendering.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Vue 3 Composition API with script setup and refs to track mounted state for SSR-safe rendering.

nodes.name: TypePlayground.vue
nodes.summary: Interactive TypeScript playground component with Monaco Editor integration, featuring 8 pre-loaded type examples demonstrating various uni-types utilities including PickRequired, DeepPartial, Brand, and conditional types.
nodes.languageNotes: Lazy loads Monaco Editor via defineAsyncComponent for optimal bundle size. Uses ClientOnly wrapper for SSR compatibility.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: VitePress theme configuration file that extends the default theme and globally registers ClientOnly and TypePlayground components for use throughout the documentation site.

nodes.name: mounted
nodes.summary: Reactive ref that tracks whether the component has been mounted, initialized to false and set to true in onMounted hook.

nodes.name: handleMount
nodes.summary: Callback function that stores the Monaco editor instance reference when mounted.

nodes.name: loadExample
nodes.summary: Loads a type example into the Monaco editor by updating the code ref with the example's code content.

nodes.name: enhanceApp
nodes.summary: Theme enhancement function that globally registers TypePlayground and ClientOnly components for use in VitePress markdown files.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Object key manipulation type utilities including key extraction, renaming, prefixing, suffixing, and filtering by value type or pattern.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Core TypeScript utility types for merging, nullable handling, string case transformations (camelCase, snake_case), tuple operations, and key introspection (required/optional/writable/readonly keys).
nodes.languageNotes: Extensive use of conditional types and mapped types for type-level programming patterns.

nodes.name: index.test.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive type-level test suite using vitest's expectTypeOf to verify correctness of utility types across tuple operations, deep transformations, type guards, string transformations, and path utilities.

nodes.name: ci.yml
nodes.summary: Continuous Integration workflow running on push and PR to master, performing type checking, linting, testing, building, and package validation with SonarCloud static analysis.

nodes.name: codacy-analysis.yml
nodes.summary: Scheduled security scan workflow using Codacy CLI to analyze code for security vulnerabilities and upload SARIF results to GitHub Advanced Security.

nodes.name: codeql-analysis.yml
nodes.summary: CodeQL security analysis workflow for JavaScript, running on push, PR, and scheduled weekly to detect security vulnerabilities and coding errors.

nodes.name: deploy.yml
nodes.summary: Documentation deployment workflow triggered on docs changes, building VitePress docs and deploying to GitHub Pages with proper concurrency handling.

nodes.name: publish.yml
nodes.summary: NPM publish workflow triggered on release creation, building and publishing the package to npm registry with package validation and npmmirror sync.

nodes.name: .codacy.yml
nodes.summary: Codacy code quality configuration with engine settings for RuboCop and duplication detection, plus exclusions for generated and documentation files.

nodes.summary: API documentation for DeepPick type utility that keeps only properties at specified nested paths, removing all others. Demonstrates path-based property selection for deep object structures.

nodes.name: deep-required.md
nodes.summary: API documentation for DeepRequired type utility that recursively makes all nested properties required by removing optional modifiers. Includes array handling examples with undefined removal.

nodes.name: component-props.md

nodes.name: prisma-create-input.md

nodes.name: props-with-children.md

nodes.name: command.md

nodes.name: eventbus.md

nodes.name: eventstore.md
nodes.summary: API documentation for the EventStore type, enabling event sourcing with append, retrieval, and subscription capabilities. Shows examples for order events and user aggregate events.

nodes.name: query.md

nodes.name: nth-parameter.md

nodes.languageNotes: Shows infer keyword usage for extracting parameter tuples from function signatures.

nodes.name: return-type.md
nodes.summary: API documentation for ReturnType utility type that extracts the return type from a function signature, including handling of async functions that return Promise types.

nodes.name: graphql-query.md

nodes.name: is-any.md
nodes.summary: API documentation for the IsAny type guard, explaining how to check if a type is `any` using a clever TypeScript pattern that exploits the special behavior of `any` in conditional types.

nodes.name: is-array.md
nodes.summary: API documentation for the IsArray type guard, explaining how to check if a type is an array type including readonly arrays and tuples, with examples showing how to extract array element types.

nodes.name: is-equal.md
nodes.summary: API documentation for the IsEqual type guard, explaining how to check if two types are exactly equal using a sophisticated pattern that works correctly with any, never, and union types.

nodes.name: is-never.md
nodes.summary: API documentation for the IsNever type guard, explaining how to check if a type is `never` using a tuple pattern to avoid the special behavior of never in conditional types.

nodes.name: is-tuple.md
nodes.summary: API documentation for the IsTuple type guard, explaining how to check if a type is a tuple (fixed-length array) versus a regular array, with examples showing length type extraction.

nodes.name: is-unknown.md
nodes.summary: API documentation for the IsUnknown type guard, explaining how to check if a type is `unknown` while correctly distinguishing from `any`, using IsEqual and IsAny internally.

nodes.name: array-element.md
nodes.summary: API documentation for the ArrayElement type utility, which extracts the element type from an array type. Includes signature, parameters, and usage examples.

nodes.name: awaited.md

nodes.name: data-only.md

nodes.name: first-parameter.md

nodes.name: function-keys.md

nodes.name: function-only.md

nodes.name: non-function-keys.md

nodes.name: suffix-keys.md

nodes.name: inc.md
